name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: seo_content_generation
prompts.template: Create SEO-optimized content focused on the keywords: {keywords}. The goal is to {marketing_goal}. Include engaging and persuasive language.
prompts.use_case: Generating SEO-optimized blog posts or website copy using AI.

prompts.name: analytics_insights
prompts.template: Analyze the following analytics data: {analytics_data}. Provide a report highlighting key performance metrics and actionable recommendations.
prompts.use_case: Improving conversion rates on landing pages via AI-powered content adjustments.

prompts.name: conversion_optimization_advice
prompts.template: Given this content: {content_data}, suggest changes to improve conversion rates targeting {marketing_goal}.
prompts.use_case: Analyzing user behavior data to inform marketing strategy decisions.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_development
prompts.template: Develop a growth engineering strategy for a campaign with parameters: {campaign_parameters}, aiming to achieve {marketing_goal}.
prompts.use_case: Developing automated growth strategies for startups or digital products.
